data.current_description: Retrieves entities related to the specified parent entity.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve related entities for parent entity
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of entities related to the specified parent entity. Supports OData filtering, sorting, and pagination conventions. Returns an EntityCollectionResponse containing the related entities. Useful for accessing sub-level form data or related records in the ERP hierarchy.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses 'Navigate' which is vague for API operations. Description lacks details about OData support, return format, and use cases. message: Operation 'createRelatedEntity' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain input format expectations, return value details, relationship establishment side effect, and permission requirements. These additions help AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

data.current_description: Creates a new entity in a sub-level form related to the specified parent entity.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new entity in a sub-level form related to the specified parent entity. The request body should contain the entity data in JSON format. Returns the created entity with its assigned identifier. This operation establishes a relationship between the new entity and the parent entity. Requires appropriate permissions for the entity collection.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to explain input format expectations, return value details, relationship establishment side effect, and permission requirements. These additions help AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

message: Operation 'updateRelatedEntity' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks important details about PATCH semantics, partial update support, input format, return value, and the requirement for both parent and related entity identifiers. Enhanced version clarifies these aspects for better AI agent understanding of operation behavior.

data.current_description: Updates an existing related entity in a sub-level form.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing related entity in a sub-level form using PATCH semantics. The request body should contain the fields to be updated in JSON format. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated entity. Requires the parent entity ID and related entity ID to identify the target record.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks important details about PATCH semantics, partial update support, input format, return value, and the requirement for both parent and related entity identifiers. Enhanced version clarifies these aspects for better AI agent understanding of operation behavior.

message: Operation 'batchOperation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is generic and doesn't clearly indicate this is a batch operation. Description lacks critical details about request format, response structure, operation scope (single parent entity), and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the batch request/response format, explains the performance benefit mechanism, specifies the operational scope, and provides context for when AI agents should use this operation versus individual operations.

data.current_description: Perform multiple insert/update operations in a single request for improved performance.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute multiple insert/update operations in batch
data.description_suggestion: Executes multiple insert and/or update operations against a single parent entity in a single request, improving performance by reducing network round-trips. The request body should contain a batch payload with individual operations. Returns a batch response containing results for each operation, including success/failure status and created/updated entity data. Useful for bulk data modifications or complex multi-step transactions within an entity hierarchy.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic and doesn't clearly indicate this is a batch operation. Description lacks critical details about request format, response structure, operation scope (single parent entity), and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the batch request/response format, explains the performance benefit mechanism, specifies the operational scope, and provides context for when AI agents should use this operation versus individual operations.

data.current_description: Retrieves a collection of entities from the specified form/entity type. Supports OData query options for filtering, sorting, pagination, and field selection.

message: Operation 'createEntity' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Creates a new entity in the specified collection. The request body should contain the entity properties as JSON.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new entity in the specified collection. The request body should contain the entity properties as a JSON object. Returns the created entity with its assigned unique identifier and any server-generated fields. The new entity is immediately persisted to the Priority system.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about what is returned and the persistence side effect. Added information about the response (created entity with ID and server-generated fields) and clarified that the entity is persisted. This helps AI agents understand the operation's effects and what data they can expect in the response.

message: Operation 'getEntity' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details. Description is minimal and doesn't explain what parameters are required or what query options are supported. Added clarity about entityId parameter requirement, complete return value, and supported OData options ($select, $expand). data.current_summary: Request an individual entity by ID
data.current_description: Retrieves a single entity by its unique identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single entity from the specified collection by its unique identifier (entityId). Returns the complete entity object with all properties. Supports OData query options like $select for field selection and $expand for related entity expansion.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and doesn't explain what parameters are required or what query options are supported. Added clarity about entityId parameter requirement, complete return value, and supported OData options ($select, $expand). message: Operation 'updateEntity' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions partial update behavior but lacks information about the response and persistence side effect. Added clarity about return value (updated entity with all properties) and that changes are immediately persisted. This helps AI agents understand the operation's effects and what data they receive after the update.

data.current_description: Updates an existing entity. Only the fields included in the request body will be updated.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing entity in the specified collection using partial update semantics. Only the fields included in the request body will be modified; omitted fields remain unchanged. Returns the updated entity object with all current properties. Changes are immediately persisted to the Priority system.
data.reasoning: Description mentions partial update behavior but lacks information about the response and persistence side effect. Added clarity about return value (updated entity with all properties) and that changes are immediately persisted. This helps AI agents understand the operation's effects and what data they receive after the update.

message: Operation 'deleteEntity' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks information about the response status and the permanent nature of the deletion. Added clarity about the 204 No Content response and emphasized that deletion is permanent and irreversible. This helps AI agents understand the operation's destructive side effect and what to expect in the response.

data.current_description: Deletes the specified entity from the collection.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes the specified entity from the collection by its unique identifier. The entity is permanently removed from the Priority system and cannot be recovered. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about the response status and the permanent nature of the deletion. Added clarity about the 204 No Content response and emphasized that deletion is permanent and irreversible. This helps AI agents understand the operation's destructive side effect and what to expect in the response.
